OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_PRIMARY_COLOR.description: The primary color for the output PDF.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_SECONDARY_COLOR.description: The secondary color for the output PDF.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_ADDRESS_LINE_1.description: The first line of your company address.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_ADDRESS_LINE_2.description: The second line of your company address.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_ADDRESS_LINE_3.description: The third line of your company address.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_PHONE_NUMBER.description: The phone number of your company.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_INDICATORS_ONLY.description: Whether to only include Observables that are Indicators in the report.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_DEFANG_URLS.description: Replace http in URL observables with hxxp.
